ARTH759 Seminar in Twentieth-Century Art (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.

ARTH768 Seminar in Latin American Art and Archaeology (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.

ARTH769 Seminar in African Art (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.

ARTT438 Advanced Sculpture Studio (3 Credits) Multi-level sculpture studio; continuation of media-speciﬁc sculpture courses with emphasis on contemporary art issues and individual directions in chosen media. Prerequisite: Must have completed one 300-level sculpture course; or permission of ARHU-Art department. Repeatable to: 12 credits.
